summary: Tested P0 Seller Free Trial Banner and P1 Cancel Purchase Button features. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components working correctly - SellerTrialBanner displays on farmer dashboard, Cancel Purchase button and modal work on auction detail page for winning bidders.
passed_tests: Backend: Farmer login returns token
Backend: Buyer login returns token
Backend: GET /api/sellers/me/listing-allowance returns proper trial status for farmer
Backend: GET /api/sellers/me/listing-allowance returns 403 for buyer
Backend: GET /api/sellers/me/listing-allowance returns 401 without auth
Backend: Free trial response has correct structure (can_list, listing_type, remaining_listings, days_remaining)
Backend: POST /api/auctions/{id}/cancel-win returns 403 if not winner
Backend: POST /api/auctions/{id}/cancel-win returns 404 for invalid auction
Backend: GET /api/users/me/cancellations returns cancellation history
Backend: Full cancel flow - create auction, buy now, cancel win, verify reactivation
Backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/auctions returns farmer's auctions
Backend: GET /api/users/me/escrows returns escrow data
Backend: GET /api/users/me/payouts returns payout data
Frontend: Farmer dashboard loads with stats and tabs
Frontend: SellerTrialBanner displays 'Free Trial Active' with '3 listings left' and '2 days remaining'
Frontend: SellerTrialBanner shows 'Create Listing' and 'Upgrade Plan' buttons
Frontend: Buyer dashboard shows 'Won Auctions' section with 'Payment Pending' badges
Frontend: Auction detail page shows 'Cancel Purchase' button for winning bidder
Frontend: Cancel Purchase modal opens with warning about suspension
Frontend: Cancel Purchase modal has 'Keep Purchase' and 'Confirm Cancel' buttons
Frontend: Cancel Purchase modal has optional reason textarea
seed_data_creation: Created test auctions during backend tests (TEST_CancelFlow_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 and P1 features fully tested and working: 1) SellerTrialBanner component displays correctly on farmer dashboard showing free trial status (3 listings left, 2 days remaining). 2) Cancel Purchase button appears on auction detail page for winning bidders who haven't paid. 3) Cancel Purchase modal shows warning about 30-day suspension after 2 cancellations. 4) Backend APIs /api/sellers/me/listing-allowance and /api/auctions/{id}/cancel-win work correctly. 5) Buyer suspension logic works - after 2 cancellations, buyer gets suspended for 30 days.

mocked_apis.email_service: MOCKED - SendGrid (403 error - sender not verified)

seller_free_trial_banner.details: SellerTrialBanner component displays on farmer dashboard. Shows 'Free Trial Active' with remaining listings count and days remaining. Has 'Create Listing' and 'Upgrade Plan' buttons.

free_trial_api.details: GET /api/sellers/me/listing-allowance returns proper trial status. Returns listing_type (free_trial_eligible, free_trial, subscription), can_list, remaining_listings, days_remaining.

cancel_purchase_button.details: Cancel Purchase button appears on auction detail page for winning bidders who haven't paid. Button has data-testid='cancel-purchase-btn'.

cancel_purchase_modal.details: Modal opens with warning about 30-day suspension after 2 cancellations. Has optional reason textarea, 'Keep Purchase' and 'Confirm Cancel' buttons.

cancel_win_api.details: POST /api/auctions/{id}/cancel-win cancels the win, reactivates the listing, records cancellation, and returns warning about suspension threshold.

buyer_suspension_logic.details: After 2 cancellations within 90 days, buyer gets suspended for 30 days. GET /api/users/me/cancellations returns cancellation history and suspension status.
